title: Santa Rosa de Copán, CP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Santa Rosa de Copán is a city in CP with a population of 70,000. A highland city near the famous Maya ruins of Copán, known for its tobacco and coffee production.
